content:
## Effective Deposit Timing
Use 17:00 as the deposit cutoff when determining the effective business day for availability quotes. For cash or electronic deposits, apply this rule exactly: full amount is available on the effective business day of the deposit. Do not split availability for those deposits unless another applicable document provides the transfer timing or delivery rule. See "Transfer Cutoff And Delivery Policy" for transfer cutoff treatment outside deposit availability.

## Check Deposit Availability
For a check deposit that is not subject to an exception, make the first 275 available after 1 business day. The remaining check amount is available after 2 business days. Quote the first tranche and the remainder separately so the customer understands which portion releases first.

## Exception Order
1. A large check deposit is a deposit over 6725. For that deposit, the excess amount is available after 5 business days.
2. A new account is an account within 30 days. For new accounts, the check remainder is available after 5 business days.
3. When both exceptions could apply, follow new_account_exception_overrides_large_deposit_exception. Do not stack the large-deposit excess rule on top of the new-account remainder rule.
title: Funds Availability Policy
